Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal: The user wants me to analyze a specific event log from a financial services company. The key challenge is that activity names are reused within the same cases. Analyze the Data: Case C001: Initiate Request Verify Documents first time Call Customer Submit Additional Verify Documents second time Approve Request Observation: Verify Documents happens twice. First is initial check second is re-check after missing info. Case C002: similar with Call Customer twice. Case C003: Verify Documents twice.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Ambiguous Activities Determine Renaming Strategy: Activity Verify Documents Instance 1: Occurs early first check Proposed Name Initial Document Check Instance 2: Occurs later after loop or adjustment Proposed Name Re-verify Documents Activity Call Customer Instance 1 C001 C002 first: about getting info clarifying issues Group A Call for Clarification Instance 2 C002 second: confirming the fix Group B Confirm Resolution Call Instance C003: Customer stepped out Customer Retrieval Call Synthesis based on general process patterns vs specific text.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Drafting the Renaming Plan: Verify Documents 1st occurrence: Initial Identity Verification Verify Documents 2nd: Secondary Verification Post-Correction Call Customer C001: Request Missing Info Call C002 1st: Issue Investigation Call C002 2nd: Adjustment Confirmation Call C003: Customer Retrieval Call Self-Correction on Granularity: If I create too many unique names the log becomes messy middle ground.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self-Correction on Granularity: Maybe Proactive Outreach vs Follow-up Lets stick to the prompts instruction Being descriptive is safer. Constructing the Output Table: refining names for C001 C002 C003 distinguishing initial vs re-verify considering physical vs digital but grouping as Initial Document Check etc.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refined List: Verify Documents Early stage Initial Document Screening Late stage Verify Resubmitted Documents Post-Fix Document Re-check Call Customer various specific names. Final Review of the Output Format: Task 1 Identify Task 2 Rename Task 3 Revised Log Task 4 Justification refining names for better readability.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Justification Section: Explain why Verify Documents was split initial screening vs re-validation why Call Customer was split investigative vs confirmatory. Constructing Final Response Proceed to generate output. This looks solid It captures the nuance required.
